title: Elemental Foundations
description: Master Helvant teaches that all magic stems from the four elemental forces: Fire, Water, Earth, and Air. To truly understand magic, you must gather pure samples of each element and attune yourself to their essence.

objectives.description: Collect fire essence from Dalhurst's blacksmith forge
objectives.notes: Player must visit the blacksmith and interact with the forge

objectives.description: Collect water essence from Millbrook's lake
Collect earth essence from the Crossroads standing stones
objectives.notes: Ancient stones at the Crossroads hold earth magic

objectives.description: Collect air essence from the hilltop near Elder Moor

objectives.notes: Player must use spells to kill enemies - tracked via combat manager

objectives.description: Return to Master Helvant with your experiences

notes: Second quest - teaches elemental theory and requires first practical spell usage in combat. Rewards Flame Burst spell and apprentice robes.
